name: @mdwrk/lander-react
description: Reusable React components for portable product landing sites.

scripts.test: node --test tests/generated-semantic-source-presence-t0.test.mjs && npm run build && node --test tests/visible-only-t0.test.mjs tests/visible-only-t1.test.mjs tests/visible-only-t2.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t0.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t1.test.mjs tests/compat-reexports-t2.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-api-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-api-t1.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-classnames-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-classnames-t1.test.mjs tests/semantic-component-classnames-t2.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t0.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t1.test.mjs tests/semantic-components-t2.test.mjs tests/semantic-schema-conformance-t1.test.mjs tests/breadcrumb-rendering.test.mjs tests/generated-semantic-families-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-types-full-field-certification-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-types-full-field-certification-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-types-full-field-certification-t2.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-properties-full-field-certification-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-properties-full-field-certification-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-properties-full-field-certification-t2.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-enumerations-full-field-certification-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-enumerations-full-field-certification-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-enumerations-full-field-certification-t2.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-datatypes-full-field-certification-t0.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-datatypes-full-field-certification-t1.test.mjs tests/generated-schemaorg-datatypes-full-field-certification-t2.test.mjs && node tests/run-smoke.mjs
